holdings.infoBox: PFDE is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.80%, Apple at 6.04%, Amazon.com at 5.55%, Microsoft at 4.62%, and Micron Technology at 4.00%.

overview.description: The Pathfinder Disciplined US Equity ETF (PFDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by actively investing in US large-cap stocks considered best positioned for outperformance. The fund uses a systematic, machine learning-powered selection process. PFDE was launched on Dec 31, 2025 and is issued by Pathfinder.
